problem_domain.zh: 力、场、统一、尺度、相变与物理域中的结构转化
problem_domain.en: Forces, fields, unification, scale, phase transitions, and structural transformations in physical domains

problem_domain.zh: 认知、动机、行为、情绪、决策与自我模型
problem_domain.en: Cognition, motivation, behavior, emotion, decision-making, and self-models

problem_domain.zh: 分子、反应、催化、溶液、物质转化与材料过程
problem_domain.en: Molecules, reactions, catalysis, solutions, material transformation, and chemical processes

problem_domain.zh: 生命体、细胞、进化、代谢、生态位与生物组织
problem_domain.en: Living systems, cells, evolution, metabolism, ecological niches, and biological organization

problem_domain.zh: 意识、神经元、脑、主观体验与认知机制
problem_domain.en: Consciousness, neurons, the brain, subjective experience, and cognitive mechanisms

problem_domain.zh: 健康、疾病、免疫、诊断、治疗与耐药
problem_domain.en: Health, disease, immunity, diagnosis, treatment, and resistance

problem_domain.zh: 存在、真理、自由意志、伦理与认识论
problem_domain.en: Being, truth, free will, ethics, and epistemology

problem_domain.zh: 王朝更替、文明延续、制度转化与历史记忆
problem_domain.en: Dynastic change, civilizational continuity, institutional transformation, and historical memory

problem_domain.zh: 叙事、文本、修辞、隐喻与故事结构
problem_domain.en: Narrative, text, rhetoric, metaphor, and story structure

problem_domain.zh: 观看、图像、摄影、审美与视觉构图
problem_domain.en: Viewing, imagery, photography, aesthetics, and visual composition

problem_domain.zh: 成本、收益、市场、投资、激励与财富分配
problem_domain.en: Cost, return, markets, investment, incentives, and wealth allocation

problem_domain.zh: 权利、法治、制度、主权、规则与治理
problem_domain.en: Rights, rule of law, institutions, sovereignty, rules, and governance

problem_domain.zh: 群体、组织、政治、阶层、协作与社会结构
problem_domain.en: Groups, organizations, politics, class structure, cooperation, and social structure

problem_domain.zh: AI、智能体、调度、接口、协议、门控与工具链
problem_domain.en: AI, agents, scheduling, interfaces, protocols, gating, and toolchains

problem_domain.zh: 架构、实现、算法、工程、控制与性能
problem_domain.en: Architecture, implementation, algorithms, engineering, control, and performance

problem_domain.zh: 学习、训练、教学、验证、复习与认知发展
problem_domain.en: Learning, training, teaching, validation, review, and cognitive development

problem_domain.zh: 生态、环境、循环、资源、气候与可持续性
problem_domain.en: Ecology, environment, cycles, resources, climate, and sustainability

problem_domain.zh: 暂未归入单一学科的跨域条目
problem_domain.en: Cross-domain entries not yet placed into a single discipline
